findings.summary: Phase 1 remaining features complete: Agent Configuration UI (3 new files + 5 modified), Context Display Enhancement (1 modified), Settings Polish (1 modified). All verified by QA with 0 blocking defects, 2 non-blocking findings both resolved.
Zero new type errors in Phase 1 feature files. 5 pre-existing errors in packages/app (session-viz/onboarding) and 1 in packages/desktop (orphaned install-cli import) — all from other lanes.
Both QA non-blocking findings resolved: F001 (missing i18n key dialog.agents.description) added to en.ts, F002 (threshold pct > 95 → pct >= 95) fixed in session-context-usage.tsx.
